philosophy: Blend calm whitespace and precise structure to create a refined, contemporary Chinese enterprise tone.

typography.fontFamily: "Noto Serif SC", "Source Han Serif SC", "PingFang SC", serif
typography.caption: 12px/1.6/400

components.hero: Use more whitespace and a concise poetic summary, but keep business metrics visible.
components.kpiCard: Cards should feel refined, with muted backgrounds and controlled accent color.
components.list: Use calmer separators and more generous row height.
components.detail: Pair summary facts with contextual notes rather than dense paragraphs.
components.form: Reduce field crowding and use calm helper text.
components.timeline: Prefer subtle linework and label hierarchy over heavy badges.
